# @platform/dev-services

Local development services: Docker Compose definitions, seed scripts, and local environment bootstrap.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/dev-services
Version: 0.1.0
Component: dev-services
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: delivery
Bounded context: dev-local
Owner: team-platform
```

```text
Stage: active

Support level: experimental
Review cadence: annual
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: false
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Define Docker Compose service definitions for all local dependencies (Postgres, Redis, Keycloak, etc.)
- Provide seed scripts to populate development databases with representative data
- Offer a single bootstrap command to start a fully operational local environment
- Document required local environment variables and their development defaults

## Non-responsibilities

- Not used in staging or production deployments
- Does not own production infrastructure definitions (owned by infra-aws)
- Does not define CI pipeline configuration (owned by tooling-ci)

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Run `docker compose up` from this package to start all local services
- Execute seed scripts after service startup for populated local data

## Operational notes

- Local service ports are fixed to avoid conflicts with host services ? see docker-compose.yml
- Keycloak realm export is committed here to enable reproducible local auth setup
